final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup / photorealistic-natural (high-end fashion editorial)
Asset type: commercial fashion photography, editorial spread
Primary request: minimalist high-end womenswear commercial shoot — model in a pure white structured architectural gown against a seamless all-white backdrop
Scene/backdrop: seamless all-white photography backdrop paper, no props, no distractions
Subject: female model standing in an elegant, upright posture — 45-degree side profile, head tilted slightly upward, sharp and confident gaze; wearing a pure white structural gown with exaggerated three-dimensional sculptural shoulder construction, cinched waist, A-line flared skirt — architectural silhouette with strong volume
Style/medium: photorealistic fashion photography, referencing Helmut Newton's classic aesthetic — high contrast, razor-sharp, bold and graphic
Composition/framing: full-length or three-quarter shot, slight low angle to elongate the figure, 85mm portrait lens, tight depth of field isolating the gown's structure
Lighting/mood: butterfly lighting setup — key light positioned directly above at 45-degree downward angle, creating strong highlights and deep shadows that accentuate the three-dimensional sculptural structure of the garment; dramatic, powerful, controlled
Color palette: strict monochromatic — white, black, and grey tones dominate; single accent of deep crimson red on the model's lips only
Materials/textures: crisp structured fabric with visible tailoring seams, matte white surface catching directional light, subtle shadow gradients on garment folds
Constraints: keep the gown's architectural shoulder structure and A-line silhouette clearly visible; deep red lips must be the sole color accent in an otherwise black-and-white-grey frame; maintain Helmut Newton high-contrast sharp aesthetic throughout
Avoid: soft pastel tones, warm color cast, blurry or diffused lighting, casual posture, over-retouched plastic skin, busy background
